task.title: Removing a preprocessor from a property group
task.shortdesc: You can remove a local, site-developed preprocessor from a property group.

keywords.indexterm: removing a preprocessors from a property group

taskbody.prereq: You must define a property group on a local or remote system.
taskbody.context: This action deletes a preprocessor definition from a property group. If you want to prevent a preprocessor from running, but keep the preprocessor definition, clear the checkbox next to the preprocessor name.

steps.stepsection: To remove a preprocessor from a property group:

step.cmd: Open a property group in the property group editor.
Open the Local Preprocessors page of Local COBOL Settings or Local PL/I Settings.
In the Preprocessors section, highlight the name of the preprocessor definition you want to delete.

step.stepresult: The preprocessor definition is deleted from the property group.

step.cmd: Click Ctrl+S to save your changes.
